subject: Fermi  trigger No 662768315: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E.Gorbovskoy, K.Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

M.L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, OAGH)

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220101.93 (trigger No 662768315,02h 03m 12.00s , -26d 04m 12.0s, R=3.91) errorbox  8219 sec after notice time and 8250 sec after trigger time at 2022-01-02 00:36:00 UT, with upper limit up to  19.5 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 11 deg. The sun  altitude  is -10.7 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -73 deg., longitude l = 213 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1835104

We obtain a following upper limits.
